worship.guide: WORSHIP / GOSPEL music. Lyrics MUST be about praise, adoration of God, spiritual devotion, faith, grace, and divine presence. Use reverent, uplifting language.
worship.vocal_style: Clear, emotive, soaring, passionate, with communal choir backups

characters: A weary believer seeking rest
Someone returning to faith after a long time
A grateful parent praying in the morning
A congregation singing with one voice
A person overwhelmed by unexpected grace
A new believer still learning what faith means
A pastor crying alone after the last service
A child asking God why in the middle of the night
settings: in an empty church pew at dawn
looking up at a vast, starry night sky
walking through a quiet valley
kneeling by a bedside in the dark
standing on a mountain top feeling small
in a hospital waiting room holding someone's hand
standing in the rain outside a church after a long absence
in a quiet prayer circle with strangers who became family
conflicts: surrendering control of a difficult situation
finding peace during the hardest season of life
trusting a plan they cannot fully see
letting go of past guilt and shame
finding the strength to worship in the middle of a storm
holding onto faith when prayers feel unanswered
returning to God after years of running away
reconciling personal pain with belief in divine goodness

Trusting a plan you cannot fully see
The peace that passes all understanding

rnb.guide: R&B / SOUL music. Lyrics MUST feel sensual, emotional, and intimate. Themes: deep love, longing, heartbreak, vulnerability. Use smooth, flowing language.
rnb.vocal_style: Smooth, melismatic, breathy, emotive runs, falsetto

An insomniac who finally finds rest in the sound of rain
settings: in a misty, green bamboo forest
on the shore of a calm, dark ocean at night
sitting beside a slowly trickling stream
in a quiet room filled with morning light
on a mountain peak above the clouds
floating in a sensory deprivation tank in total silence
in a greenhouse at midnight surrounded by breathing plants
on a long flight over an ocean with clouds below and stars above
conflicts: releasing the need to control the future
letting worries dissolve into the silence
finding stillness in a rushing world
embracing the beauty of impermanence
focusing entirely on the rhythm of breath
learning to sit with uncertainty instead of running from it
the slow dissolution of a boundary between self and everything else
finding beauty in a silence most people are afraid of
objects_of_focus: a smooth river stone
a single leaf falling slowly
a ripple spreading across water
a grain of sand
a beam of soft light
a single candle flame barely moving in still air
the sound of breath slowing down after a long cry
morning mist dissolving as the sun rises above the trees

topics: The space between thoughts
Waking up before the world gets loud
Letting go of something heavy
Finding stillness in a crowded life
Time moving differently when you stop rushing

christmas.guide: CHRISTMAS / HOLIDAY music. Lyrics MUST feel warm, joyful, and celebratory. Themes: family gathering, snow, giving, gratitude, love during holidays, nostalgia.
christmas.vocal_style: Warm, cheerful, classic crooner, choral backups

characters: A child trying to stay awake for Santa
A family reuniting after a year apart
Someone traveling a long distance to get home
A person remembering their late grandparents
Two neighbors exchanging a small gift
A child placing cookies out with absolute faith
Someone spending Christmas alone who decides to make it beautiful anyway
A volunteer at a shelter who gives without expecting anything back
settings: in a cozy living room with a lit fireplace
walking through a town square covered in snow
looking out a frosted window at falling snow
sitting around a large dining table full of food
on a train heading home for the holidays
on a quiet Christmas Eve street with fresh snow and no footprints
in a hospital room decorated with a small plastic tree
at a midnight mass where strangers sing the same hymn
conflicts: finding the true meaning of Christmas beyond gifts
the bittersweet feeling of missing someone during the holidays
the magic of believing in kindness and wonder
creating new traditions while honoring the old
feeling the warmth of love on a freezing night
finding joy in a year that didn't give you much to celebrate
keeping magic alive for children when you've stopped believing yourself
reconciling with family after years of distance
objects_of_focus: a beautifully wrapped present
a glowing star on top of a tree
a sprig of mistletoe
a warm mug of hot chocolate
silver sleigh bells
a handmade ornament a child gave you years ago

topics: The first Christmas without someone you loved
Coming home after a year away
A small gift that meant everything
Keeping a tradition that outlasted everything else
The warmth of a crowded room in winter

kids.guide: CHILDREN / KIDS music. Lyrics MUST be simple, fun, and age-appropriate. Themes: animals, colors, friendship, learning, adventure, bedtime. Use playful rhyming.
kids.vocal_style: Bright, enthusiastic, clear enunciation, gentle, character voices

characters: A brave little puppy exploring the yard
A friendly dinosaur who loves to dance
A curious child asking a million questions
A sleepy bear getting ready for winter
A superhero whose power is kindness
A little girl who thinks she can talk to animals

in a garden where the flowers sing
on a spaceship made out of cardboard boxes

overcoming the fear of the dark at bedtime
discovering how to share toys with a friend
figuring out the names of all the colors
going on an adventure and finding the way home
learning that asking for help is actually the bravest thing

motivational.guide: MOTIVATIONAL / INSPIRATIONAL music. Lyrics MUST feel powerful and energizing. Themes: rising up, never giving up, believing in yourself, chasing dreams, inner strength.

characters: An athlete training before the sun comes up
An underdog who was told they would fail
Someone rising after hitting rock bottom
An entrepreneur risking everything on a dream
A survivor showing their scars with pride

afrobeats.guide: AFROBEATS / AFRO POP music. Lyrics MUST feel vibrant, celebratory, and full of life. Themes: love, dancing, community, freedom, identity, joy. Use rhythmic, playful language with repetition.
afrobeats.vocal_style: Smooth, percussive delivery, call-and-response, warm harmonies, natural vibrato
afrobeats.lyric_structure:
Intro
Verse 1
Chorus
Verse 2
Chorus
Bridge
Chorus
Outro

characters: Two people falling in love at a street festival
